sentences.translation: Svaki musliman ima poseban serdžadu za namaz.
sentences.translationEn: Every Muslim has a special prayer rug.

sentences.translation: Stavlja je na čisto i mirno mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: He places it in a clean and quiet place.

sentences.arabic: يُصَلِّي عَلَيْهَا خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ فِي اليَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Klanja na njoj pet puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: He prays on it five times a day.

sentences.translation: Neki serdžadeti su ukrašeni lijepim oblicima.
sentences.translationEn: Some prayer rugs are decorated with beautiful patterns.
